response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics of the songs ('I can\'t control myself' and '未来島 -Future Island-') perfectly match the reference lyrics.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics reference for both songs and supplemented the talk segment with highly accurate manual transcription and translation.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles tightly to the vocal events. Grouped and paced the spoken talk segment smoothly with logical line breaks. No subtitles were placed during pure instrumentals.

subtitles.original: 狂って 壊れてしまうよ
subtitles.english: ...I'll go mad and be destroyed.

subtitles.original: もう何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've already repeated it so many times...

subtitles.original: 神様に願いをかけて
subtitles.english: ...making a wish to God...

subtitles.original: 何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: ...repeating it over and over again.

subtitles.original: 世界 世界
subtitles.english: Waiting for...

subtitles.original: 開くのを待っている
subtitles.english: ...the world, the world to open.

subtitles.original: もうなんにもいらないから
subtitles.english: Because I don't need anything anymore...

subtitles.original: 零れた想いは愛おしい
subtitles.english: ...the spilled feelings are precious.

subtitles.original: 何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've already repeated it so many times...

subtitles.original: 世界 世界
subtitles.english: Waiting for...

subtitles.original: 開くのを...
subtitles.english: ...the world, the world to open...

subtitles.original: もう何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've already repeated it so many times...

subtitles.original: 神様に願いをかけて
subtitles.english: ...making a wish to God...

subtitles.original: 何度も繰り返して
subtitles.english: ...repeating it over and over again.

subtitles.original: 世界 世界
subtitles.english: Waiting for...

subtitles.original: 開くのを待っている
subtitles.english: ...the world, the world to open.

subtitles.original: Yeah yeah yeah! Yay!
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah! Yay!

subtitles.original: Our first guest is AZKi-senpai!
subtitles.english: Our first guest is AZKi-senpai!

subtitles.original: AZKi!
subtitles.english: AZKi!

subtitles.original: 右手にマイク、左手に地図、あなたのハートをゼロゲッサー！
subtitles.english:
With a mic in my right hand, a map in my left,
Zeroguessar of your heart!

subtitles.original: カリオペちゃん、ハッピーバースデー！
subtitles.english: Calliope-chan, Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！バースデーです！誕生日です！
subtitles.english:
Thank you so much!
It's my birthday! Yes, my birthday!

subtitles.original:
誕生日ガール！
ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english:
Birthday girl!
Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: さっき一緒に歌った曲、大好きです。
subtitles.english: I absolutely love the song we just sang together.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！なんと、AZKiのオリジナル曲を一緒に歌わせていただきました！
subtitles.english:
Thank you so much! Amazingly, I got to sing
AZKi's original song together with you!

subtitles.original: そうですね。ずっとバンドアレンジで歌いたかったから、選びました。
subtitles.english:
That's right. I've always wanted to sing it
with a band arrangement, so I chose it.

subtitles.original:
めっちゃ熱かったです！
やったー！
subtitles.english:
It was super hot!
Yay!

subtitles.original: 楽しかったよね。バンドの演奏も凄かったです。
subtitles.english:
It was so fun, wasn't it?
The band's performance was amazing too!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much. Yay!

subtitles.original: あ、ちなみに、ステージと見てほしい。
subtitles.english: Ah, by the way, I want you to look at the stage.

subtitles.original: いや、凄い！めちゃくちゃピカピカ光ってる！
subtitles.english:
Wow, amazing!
It's shining so brightly!

subtitles.original: ピカピカストーン！ピカピカストーン！
subtitles.english: Sparkling stone! Sparkling stone!

subtitles.original:
そうですよね。素敵なステージですよね。
素敵なステージです。
subtitles.english:
That's right. It's a wonderful stage, isn't it?
It's a wonderful stage.

subtitles.original:
ちなみに...
ちなみに？
subtitles.english:
By the way...
By the way?

subtitles.original:
AZKi先輩の誕生石は知ってる？
AZKiの誕生石は...
subtitles.english:
Do you know AZKi-senpai's birthstone?
AZKi's birthstone is...

subtitles.original: 7月なんですけど、ルビー！ルビー、この色！
subtitles.english:
I'm born in July, so it's Ruby!
Ruby, this color!

subtitles.original: そう、なりました！すごい！この色が変わるんです、今日は。
subtitles.english:
Yes, it changed! Amazing!
The color changes today.

subtitles.original:
すごい！めっちゃ赤です。
そうですね。めっちゃ綺麗だから、一緒に写真撮りたい。
subtitles.english:
Amazing! It's super red.
Yes, since it's so beautiful, let's take a photo.

subtitles.original:
あ、撮りたい！撮りたい、せっかく！
Take screenshots! Screenshots!
subtitles.english:
Ah, I want to! Let's do it!
Take screenshots! Screenshots!

subtitles.original:
いい感じです。
イェーイ！イェーイ、イェーイ、イェーイ！
subtitles.english:
Looking good!
Yay! Yay, yay, yay!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、まあ、生ライブだから、やっぱ、水飲みたいと思う。
subtitles.english:
Well, since it's a live concert,
I really want to drink some water.

subtitles.original:
水飲もう！
乾杯！水乾杯です。
subtitles.english:
Let's drink some water!
Cheers! A toast with water.

subtitles.original:
はい、乾杯！
Cheers!
subtitles.english:
Yes, cheers!
Cheers!

subtitles.original: Mmm!
subtitles.english: Mmm!

subtitles.original: じゃあ次、次の曲。
subtitles.english: Now, the next song.

subtitles.original: お、次の曲は何だろうな？
subtitles.english: Oh, I wonder what the next song is?

subtitles.original:
もう一曲ありますよね、一緒に。
あります！
subtitles.english:
We have one more song together, don't we?
We do!

subtitles.original:
そう、さっきAZKi先輩のオリ曲歌いましたね。
はい、そうです。
subtitles.english:
Yes, we just sang AZKi-senpai's original song, right?
Yes, that's right.

subtitles.original:
今回は、カリオペのオリ曲です。
歌わせていただきます！
subtitles.english:
This time, it's Calliope's original song.
I will be singing it with you!

subtitles.original:
The next song is Calliope's original, 'Miraijima'!
「未来島」！
subtitles.english:
The next song is Calliope's original, 'Miraijima'!
'Miraijima'!

subtitles.original: 危険な海に浮かぶ島　エッグヘッドへ
subtitles.english: To Egghead, an island floating in a dangerous sea

subtitles.original: 世界変える未来島のLabo
subtitles.english: The Lab of the future island that will change the world

subtitles.original: 最高の発明 叶えるよ願望
subtitles.english: The greatest inventions will grant your desires

subtitles.original: 未来のお宝 探しちゃおう
subtitles.english: Let's look for the treasures of the future

subtitles.original: 天才が引き起こす発想の奇跡
subtitles.english: A miracle of ideas brought about by a genius

subtitles.original: 脳内終わらせない夢 of Fantasy
subtitles.english: An endless fantasy of dreams inside the brain

subtitles.original: 世界ひっくり返るテクノロジー
subtitles.english: Technology that turns the world upside down

subtitles.original: 大体叶えちゃうラボラトリー
subtitles.english: A laboratory that makes almost anything come true

subtitles.original: シャッカ リリス エジソン
subtitles.english: Shaka, Lilith, Edison...

subtitles.original: ピタゴラス アトラス ヨーク 6人のサテライト
subtitles.english: ...Pythagoras, Atlas, York—the six satellites!

subtitles.original: 湧き出すアイデア 止まらない
subtitles.english: The gushing ideas won't stop

subtitles.original: 忙しすぎてネコの手も借りたい
subtitles.english: We're so busy we'd even take a cat's help

subtitles.original: 海も何も超えていく海賊を
subtitles.english: The pirates who transcend the seas and everything else

subtitles.original: 常識変えていく発明を
subtitles.english: The inventions that change common sense

subtitles.original: そんな奴らに憧れてきた
subtitles.english: I've always admired those kinds of people

subtitles.original: 次は誰が王になる
subtitles.english: Who will become the King next?

subtitles.original: 無限の夢 未来の知恵
subtitles.english: Infinite dreams, future wisdom

subtitles.original: 煌めきを巻き起こせ エッグヘッド
subtitles.english: Stir up the sparkle on Egghead!

subtitles.original: 無限の夢 未来の知恵
subtitles.english: Infinite dreams, future wisdom

subtitles.original: 過去の世界も飛び越して
subtitles.english: Leaping even past the worlds of the past!

subtitles.original: ベガパンク 生み出すよアイデア ベガパンク
subtitles.english: Vegapunk! Generating ideas, Vegapunk!
